sqlMap.select: SELECT LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
SELECT MEMBERID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, B.updateStatus, A.title, A.memberid, A.membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.commentStatus, B.shareStatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE (B.updatestatus = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status != '2'
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE
AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY
$orderOption1$
B.updatestatus DESC, B.updatedate DESC, A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID, A.IMPORTANCE, A.HASFILE, A.STATUS, B.UPDATESTATUS, A.TITLE, A.MEMBERNAME, A.MEMBERID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS REGDATE, B.STATUS AS CONFIRMSTATUS, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.CONFIRMDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS CONFIRMDATE, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.UPDATEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS UPDATEDATE, IFNULL(C.CONFIRMCOUNT, '0') AS CONFIRMCOUNT, D.CONFIRMTOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE
A.STATUS != '2' AND (B.updatestatus = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND B.MEMBERID = #memberID#
A.STATUS != '2' AND (B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) OR B.COMMENTSTATUS = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND B.MEMBERID = #memberID# AND A.MEMBERID != #memberID#
A.STATUS != '2' AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.MEMBERID = B.MEMBERID AND A.MEMBERID = #memberID#
A.STATUS = '2' AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.MEMBERID = #memberID#
AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchKeyword#, '%')
AND #startDate# <= A.REGDATE AND #endDate# > A.REGDATE
ORDER BY B.UPDATESTATUS DESC, B.UPDATEDATE DESC, A.REGDATE DESC
ORDER BY A.REGDATE DESC
select.isEqual:
SELECT DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID, A.IMPORTANCE, A.HASFILE, A.STATUS, A.TITLE, A.MEMBERNAME, C.UPDATESTATUS, A.MEMBERID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS REGDATE, C.STATUS AS CONFIRMSTATUS, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.CONFIRMDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS CONFIRMDATE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.UPDATEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATEDATE, IFNULL(E.CONFIRMCOUNT, '0') AS CONFIRMCOUNT, F.CONFIRMTOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE MEMBERID = #memberID#) B ON A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER C ON A.CIRCULARID = C.CIRCULARID LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) E ON A.circularid = E.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) F ON A.circularid = F.circularid WHERE C.UPDATESTATUS = '3' AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchKeyword#, '%')
AND #startDate# <= A.REGDATE AND #endDate# > A.REGDATE
ORDER BY A.REGDATE DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.updatestatus = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status != 2 AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID AND A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID WHERE
A.STATUS != '2' AND (B.UPDATESTATUS = 0 OR B.COMMENTSTATUS = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND B.MEMBERID = #memberID#
A.STATUS != '2' AND (B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) OR B.COMMENTSTATUS = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND B.MEMBERID = #memberID# AND A.MEMBERID != #memberID#
A.STATUS != '2' AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.MEMBERID = B.MEMBERID AND A.MEMBERID = #memberID#
A.STATUS = '2' AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.MEMBERID = #memberID#
AND #startDate# <= A.REGDATE AND #endDate# > A.REGDATE
AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchKeyword#, '%') AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID#
select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE MEMBERID = #memberID#) B ON A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER C ON A.CIRCULARID = C.CIRCULARID WHERE C.UPDATESTATUS = '3' AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID#
AND #startDate# <= A.REGDATE AND #endDate# > A.REGDATE
AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchKeyword#, '%')

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, A.option, A.content, A.memberName, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.updateStatus, B.commentStatus, B.shareStatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.MEMBERID = C.CN LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.circularid

SELECT A.MEMBERID, A.MEMBERNAME, A.MEMBERNAME2, B.TITLE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_BM B ON A.CIRCULARBMID = B.CIRCULARBMID WHERE A.CIRCULARBMID = #circularBMId# AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID#
SELECT CIRCULARFILEID, FILESIZE, FILENAME, FILEPATH FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.circularbmid, A.title, A.regdate, (SELECT membername FROM tbl_circular_bmuser WHERE circularbmid = A.circularbmid ORDER BY circularbmuserid LIMIT 1) membername, (SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE circularbmid = A.circularbmid) membernamecount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM A WHERE A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

SELECT A.circularbmid, A.memberid, B.company, B.description, B.title, A.membername, B.mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn AND A.tenantid = B.tenant_id WHERE circularbmid = #v_CIRCULARBMID# AND tenantid = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(CIRCULARID) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE UPDATESTATUS = 1 AND CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND MEMBERID = #memberID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, A.membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, B.updatestatus, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.STATUS != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid != #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE
ORDER BY $orderOption1$
ORDER BY A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.STATUS != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND A.memberid != #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE

SELECT DISTINCT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, A.membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1)
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE
AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.circularID ORDER BY
$orderOption1$
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE MEMBERID = #memberId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status != 2 AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = b.memberid AND A.memberid = #memberID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, A.membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, B.updatestatus, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE A.MEMBERID = #memberID# AND A.MEMBERID = B.MEMBERID AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.STATUS != 2
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE
AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) GROUP BY A.CIRCULARID ORDER BY
$orderOption1$
A.REGDATE DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT CIRCULARFOLDERNAME FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE CIRCULARFOLDERID = #folderId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, A.membername, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS regdate, B.status AS confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(B.updatedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS updatedate, IFNULL(C.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, D.confirmtotalcount, B.updatestatus FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) C ON A.circularid = C.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) D ON A.circularid = D.circularid WHERE (B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #memberID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.deletestatus = 0) AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')
GROUP BY A.circularid ORDER BY
$orderOption1$
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #memberID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.deletestatus = 0) AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.CIRCULARID) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE MEMBERID = #memberID#) B ON A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER C ON B.CIRCULARFOLDERID = C.CIRCULARFOLDERID JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER D ON A.CIRCULARID = D.CIRCULARID WHERE
B.CIRCULARFOLDERID = #folderID# AND
A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE AND
D.UPDATESTATUS = '3' AND A.TENANTID = #tenantID#

SELECT distinct A.circularid, A.importance, A.hasfile, A.status, A.title, A.memberid, A.membername, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS regdate, d.status as confirmstatus, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(D.confirmdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '') AS confirmdate, D.updatestatus, IFNULL(E.confirmcount, '0') AS confirmcount, F.confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE MEMBERID = #memberID#) B ON A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER C ON B.circularfolderid = C.circularfolderid JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER D ON A.CIRCULARID = D.CIRCULARID LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmCount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.status = 1 AND BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) E ON A.circularid = E.circularid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BB.circularid, CAST(COUNT(if(AA.memberID != BB.memberID, BB.circularid, NULL)) AS char(10)) AS confirmtotalcount FROM TBL_CIRCULAR AA JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER BB ON AA.circularid = BB.circularid AND AA.tenantid = BB.tenantid WHERE BB.tenantid = 0 GROUP BY BB.circularid) F ON A.circularid = F.circularid WHERE
B.CIRCULARFOLDERID = #folderID# AND
A.title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchValue#), '%') AND
DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#sdate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)<= A.REGDATE AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#edate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL -#offset# MINUTE)> A.REGDATE AND
D.memberid = #memberID# AND D.updatestatus = '3' AND A.tenantid = #tenantID# ORDER BY
$orderOption1$
A.regdate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT FILEPATH, FILENAME FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND CIRCULARFILEID = #circularFileID#
SELECT STATUS FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND MEMBERID = #memberID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
SELECT CN AS MEMBERID, DISPLAYNAME AS MEMBERNAME, DISPLAYNAME2 AS MEMBERNAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #memberID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(NAME1, '') AS NAME1, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LISTOPTION WHERE LISTTYPE = #listType# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

SELECT circularid, circularcommentid, circularuserid, circularcomment, memberid, membername, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS regdate, status, tenantid FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT B.cn AS memberid, B.displayName AS membername, B.displayName2 AS membername2, B.mail AS mail FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.memberid = B.cn AND A.tenantid = B.tenant_id WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#
AND A.memberid = #memberID#
AND A.status = 0

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(B.circularcommentstateid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND ((A.status = 1 AND (A.circularuserid = #memberID# OR A.memberid = #memberID#)) OR (A.status = 0)) AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(B.circularcommentstateid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE B ON A.circularcommentid = B.circularcommentid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularid = #circularID# AND B.memberid = #memberID# AND B.status = 0 AND B.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.updatestatus = 0 OR B.commentstatus = 1 OR B.sharestatus = 1) AND A.status != 2 AND B.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status != '2' AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND B.memberid = #userID# AND A.memberid != #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status != 2 AND B.UPDATESTATUS IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = b.memberid AND A.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.status = 2 AND B.updatestatus IN (0, 1) AND A.memberid = #userID# AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT A.circularid), 0) cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE (B.updatestatus = '2' AND A.memberid = #userID#) OR (B.updatestatus = '2' AND B.memberid = #userID# AND B.deletestatus = 0) AND A.tenantid = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS cnt FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND memberID = #memberID# AND tenantID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.status FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A JOIN TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B ON A.circularid = B.circularid AND A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.circularID = #circularID# AND B.memberID = #circularUserID# AND B.tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR (CIRCULARID, TITLE, IMPORTANCE, OPTION, CONTENT, HASFILE, STATUS, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, REGDATE, ENDDATE, TENANTID) VALUES (#circularID#, #title#, #importance#, #option#, #content#, #hasFile#, #status#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #regDate#, #endDate#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_USER (CIRCULARUSERID, CIRCULARID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, STATUS, CONFIRMDATE, UPDATESTATUS, TENANTID) VALUES (#circularUserID# ,#circularID#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #status#, #confirmDate#, #updateStatus#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE ( CIRCULARID, FILENAME, FILESIZE, FILEPATH, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #circularID#, #fileName#, #fileSize#, #filePath#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER ( CIRCULARBMID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, TENANTID ) select #CIRCULARBMID#, cn, displayname, displayname2, tenant_id from tbl_usermaster where cn = #v_MEMBERID# and tenant_id = #TENANTID#
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_MEMBERID#, #v_LISTCOUNT#, #v_PREVIEW#, '50', '50', #v_TENANTID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER ( CIRCULARFOLDERNAME, MEMBERID, REGDATE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #folderName#, #memberId#, #regDate#, #tenantId# )
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK ( CIRCULARFOLDERID, CIRCULARID, MEMBERID, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #folderId#, #circularId#, #memberId#, #tenantId# )

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT (circularid, circularuserid, circularcomment, memberid, membername, membername2, regdate, status, tenantid) VALUES (#circularID#, #circularUserID#, #circularComment#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #nowDate#, #status#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE (circularcommentid, memberid, status, tenantid) VALUES (#circularCommentID#, #circularUserID#, #commentConfirmStatus#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET TITLE = #title#, IMPORTANCE = #importance#, OPTION = #option#, CONTENT = #content#, HASFILE = #hasFile# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET LISTCNT = #v_LISTCOUNT#, ISPREVIEW = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET updatestatus = 1 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND updatestatus = 0 AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET status = #status#, confirmdate = #confirmDate# WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET LISTCNT = #listCnt#, ISPREVIEW = #isPreview#, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #previewListValue#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #previewContentValue# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND MEMBERID = #memberID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = 0 WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = 2, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #v_CONTENT#, LISTCNT = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = 1, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #v_CONTENT#, LISTCNT = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_BM SET TITLE = #TITLE# WHERE CIRCULARBMID = #CIRCULARBMID# AND TENANTID = #TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #MEMBERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET STATUS = '1' WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER SET CIRCULARFOLDERNAME = #folderName#, REGDATE = #regDate# WHERE CIRCULARFOLDERID = #folderId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET UPDATESTATUS = '2' WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND MEMBERID IN ('', #memberID#) AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET UPDATESTATUS = #updateStatus# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK SET CIRCULARFOLDERID = #folderId# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET UPDATESTATUS = #status# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND MEMBERID = #memberID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET commentStatus = #commentStatus#, deleteStatus = #deleteStatus#
updatedate = #nowDate#
WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE SET status = 1, confirmDate = #nowDate# WHERE circularcommentid IN (SELECT circularCommentID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND circularuserid = #memberID# ) AND status = 0 AND tenantid = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET shareStatus = #shareStatus#, deleteStatus = #deleteStatus#
updatedate = #nowDate#
WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET deletestatus = 1 WHERE circularid = #circularID# AND memberid = #userID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM WHERE CIRCULARBMID = #v_CIRCULARBMID# AND TENANTID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FILE WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE CIRCULARBMID = #CIRCULARBMID# AND TENANTID = #TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_FOLDER WHERE CIRCULARFOLDERID = #deleteFolderId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_LINK WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND MEMBERID = #memberID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENTSTATE WHERE circularcommentID = #circularCommentID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_COMMENT WHERE circularID = #circularID# AND circularcommentID = #circularCommentID# AND memberid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
